tree.setup: The lobby of a police station near the tourist district, where a rotating fan stirs the warm afternoon air. Officer Liang sits behind a desk that is organized with military precision — pens sorted by color, forms stacked by type. She handles lost-item reports with the thoroughness of someone who believes every misplaced object has a story, and every story has a resolution.
tree.setup_zh: 旅游区附近派出所的大厅，旋转风扇搅动着温暖的午后空气。梁警官坐在一张军事级整洁的桌子后面——笔按颜色分类，表格按类型叠放。她处理遗失物品报告时有一种信念：每件丢失的东西都有一个故事，每个故事都有一个结局。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_pinyin: nǐ hǎo, qǐngwèn yǒu shénme shì?
turns.text_en: Hello, how can I help you?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Tell her you've lost your passport.

options.text_zh: 你好，我的护照丢了。我是外国人，昨天在出租车上可能掉了。我需要报案。
options.text_pinyin: nǐ hǎo, wǒ de hùzhào diū le. wǒ shì wàiguó rén, zuótiān zài chūzū chē shàng kěnéng diào le. wǒ xūyào bào àn.
options.text_en: Hello, I've lost my passport. I'm a foreigner — I may have dropped it in a taxi yesterday. I need to file a report.
options.feedback: Clear situation, possible location, and knowing to file a report — Officer Liang pulls out the right form immediately.
She hears the alarm in your voice and switches to her calm, methodical mode.

options.text_pinyin: wǒ yǒu yí gè hěn dà de wèntí.
options.feedback: Officer Liang waits patiently. Big problems are her specialty, but she needs specifics.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 别着急。我帮你填一个报案表。请问你是哪个国家的？护照号码记得吗？
turns.text_pinyin: bié zháojí. wǒ bāng nǐ tián yí gè bào àn biǎo. qǐngwèn nǐ shì nǎge guójiā de? hùzhào hàomǎ jìde ma?
turns.text_en: Don't worry. I'll help you fill out a report. What country are you from? Do you remember your passport number?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Provide your nationality and passport info.

options.text_zh: 我是美国人。护照号码我手机里有照片，我找一下……在这里，号码是这个。
options.text_pinyin: wǒ shì Měiguó rén. hùzhào hàomǎ wǒ shǒujī lǐ yǒu zhàopiàn, wǒ zhǎo yíxià……zài zhèlǐ, hàomǎ shì zhège.
options.text_en: I'm American. I have a photo of my passport on my phone — let me find it... here, the number is this.
options.feedback: A photo of your passport on your phone — Officer Liang gives you the look of someone who has just met a genuinely prepared traveler. This is rare.

options.text_zh: 我是美国人。护照号码我不记得了。
options.text_pinyin: wǒ shì Měiguó rén. hùzhào hàomǎ wǒ bú jìde le.
options.text_en: I'm American. I don't remember the passport number.
options.feedback: She can work without the number — your embassy can provide it later.

options.text_zh: 美国来的。其他的我不太清楚。
options.text_pinyin: Měiguó lái de. qítā de wǒ bú tài qīngchǔ.
options.text_en: From America. I'm not sure about the rest.
options.feedback: She adds what she can and plans to contact the embassy for the rest.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好的，有照片最好。你还需要去你们国家的大使馆补办一个临时护照。你知道大使馆的地址吗？
turns.text_pinyin: hǎo de, yǒu zhàopiàn zuì hǎo. nǐ hái xūyào qù nǐmen guójiā de dàshǐguǎn bǔ bàn yí gè línshí hùzhào. nǐ zhīdào dàshǐguǎn de dìzhǐ ma?
turns.text_en: Good, having a photo is best. You'll also need to go to your country's embassy for a temporary passport. Do you know the embassy's address?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Ask about the embassy or say you know the location.

options.text_zh: 我知道大使馆在哪里。请问你们这个报案单我去大使馆的时候要带吗？
options.text_pinyin: wǒ zhīdào dàshǐguǎn zài nǎlǐ. qǐngwèn nǐmen zhège bào àn dān wǒ qù dàshǐguǎn de shíhòu yào dài ma?
options.text_en: I know where the embassy is. Do I need to bring this police report when I go?
options.feedback: Thinking ahead about documentation — Officer Liang confirms that yes, the embassy will need this report.

options.text_zh: 大使馆在哪里？你能告诉我吗？
options.text_pinyin: dàshǐguǎn zài nǎlǐ? nǐ néng gàosu wǒ ma?
options.text_en: Where is the embassy? Can you tell me?
options.feedback: She writes the address on a separate card for you. She keeps embassy addresses for six countries memorized.

options.text_zh: 还要去大使馆？这么麻烦……
options.text_pinyin: hái yào qù dàshǐguǎn? zhème máfan……
options.text_en: I have to go to the embassy too? So much hassle...
options.feedback: Officer Liang nods sympathetically. Losing a passport is never just one errand — it's a whole quest.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 对，这个报案单一定要带。好了，报案表填好了。这是你的那份，请收好。祝你顺利。
turns.text_pinyin: duì, zhège bào àn dān yídìng yào dài. hǎo le, bào àn biǎo tián hǎo le. zhè shì nǐ de nà fèn, qǐng shōu hǎo. zhù nǐ shùnlì.
turns.text_en: Yes, you must bring this report. OK, the form is done. Here's your copy — keep it safe. Good luck.

options.text_zh: 非常感谢梁警官！你帮了我大忙。我现在就去大使馆。
options.text_pinyin: fēicháng gǎnxiè Liáng jǐngguān! nǐ bāng le wǒ dà máng. wǒ xiànzài jiù qù dàshǐguǎn.
options.text_en: Thank you so much, Officer Liang! You've been a huge help. I'll head to the embassy now.
options.feedback: Grateful and action-oriented. She watches you leave with a small nod — another story headed toward its resolution.
Brief but sincere. She straightens her pens and waits for the next visitor.

options.text_pinyin: hǎo ba. xīwàng néng zhǎo dào hùzhào.
options.text_en: Alright. Hope the passport turns up.
options.feedback: Officer Liang gives you a realistic but kind look. Hope is good; the embassy is better.

tree.cultural_note: If you lose your passport in China, you need two things: a police report (报案单, bào àn dān) from the local station, and a visit to your country's embassy or consulate for a temporary replacement. Always keep a photo of your passport on your phone as backup.
